name: jstack
description: Universal JStack slash commands, workflow skill, and MCP tools for enterprise Codex development.

interface.shortDescription: Universal enterprise workflow slash commands for Codex
interface.longDescription: JStack adds three global Codex slash commands: single-lead development, right-sized specialist subagents, and full 11-role team mode. It includes a JStack skill and MCP quality-gate tools for planning, review, QA, release readiness, and quant/backtest checks.
defaultPrompt: Use /j-stack-dev to run the single-lead workflow.
Use /jstack-subagents for the right specialist team.
